# The Opera browser overview
> The Opera browser is a fast, secure, and privacy-focused web browser available on desktop and mobile platforms. It combines high performance with innovative features, including a built-in Ad Blocker, a Free VPN, an AI assistant, advanced tab management, Workspaces, Integrated messengers, and multimedia tools such as Video Popout and Music Player. Opera is a Chromium-based browser that maximizes compatibility with modern web technologies and supports Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, and iOS.

About the company:

Opera is a global, user-centric software company focused on delivering the best possible internet experience across devices. Opera browsers are used by hundreds of millions of people worldwide. Founded in 1995 and headquartered in Oslo, Norway, Opera is a public company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker OPRA. Opera emphasizes privacy, speed, AI integration, and innovative browsing features.
Download Opera products from https://www.opera.com.
Learn more at https://investor.opera.com.

# Other Opera Products

## Opera News
Description: Personalized news app delivering trending stories, live scores, and entertainment updates.
URL: https://www.opera.com/news

## Opera Addons
Description: Browser extensions and addons for customization and enhanced functionality.
URL: https://addons.opera.com

## GameMaker
Description: GameMaker is a complete development tool for creating 2D games for multiple platforms. Supported platforms include Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS, HTML5, Xbox Series X|S, PlayStation 5, and Nintendo Switch. GameMaker is built on a proprietary engine optimized for 2D game creation.
URL: https://gamemaker.io/en

## MiniPay
Description: MiniPay is a self-custodial stablecoin wallet built on the Celo blockchain. It allows users to send funds globally with just a phone number. It supports USD stablecoins and is integrated into Opera Mini, also available as a standalone app for Android and iOS.
URL: https://www.minipay.to

---

# The Opera browser – Features library

## AI & Productivity Tools
- Opera AI: Built-in assistant for chat, summaries, and content generation.
- [AI Image Generator](https://www.opera.com/features/opera-ai-image-generator): Create images from text prompts.
- [Opera Translate](https://www.opera.com/features/translation): Translates web pages instantly.

## Privacy & Security
- [Ad Blocker](https://www.opera.com/features/ad-blocker): Blocks ads and web trackers.
- [Free VPN](https://www.opera.com/features/free-vpn): Encrypts browser traffic and hides your IP address.
- [VPN Pro](https://www.opera.com/features/vpn-pro): Device-wide VPN protection for multiple devices and locations.
- [Battery Saver](https://www.opera.com/features/battery-saver): Reduces power use to extend battery life.

## Media & Creativity
- [Music Player](https://www.opera.com/features/music-player): Stream music and podcasts from the sidebar.
- [Lucid Mode](https://www.opera.com/features/lucid-mode): Enhances sharpness and contrast in videos and images.
- [Video Popout](https://www.opera.com/features/video-popout): Keeps videos visible while browsing other tabs.
- [Snapshot](https://www.opera.com/features/snapshot): Capture and edit screenshots of web pages.

## Tabs, Layout & Navigation
- [Tab Islands](https://www.opera.com/features/tab-islands): Groups related tabs together.
- [Workspaces](https://www.opera.com/features/workspaces): Organize tabs into separate spaces in the sidebar.
- [Tab Emojis](https://www.opera.com/features/tab-emojis): Add emoji icons to your tabs.
- Tab Traces: Highlights recently used tabs.
- [Split Screen](https://www.opera.com/features/splitscreen): Display two to four tabs on one screen.
- [Search in Tabs](https://www.opera.com/features/search-in-tabs): Find open tabs by title or content.

## Integrated Messaging & Social
- [Bluesky, WhatsApp, Telegram, Messenger, VK](https://www.opera.com/features/integrated-messengers): Popular messengers built into Opera's sidebar.
- [Slack](https://www.opera.com/features/slack): Built into Opera's sidebar.
- [Discord](https://www.opera.com/features/discord): Built into Opera's sidebar.
- [Instagram, X, TikTok](https://www.opera.com/features/integrated-social-media): Popular social media apps built into Opera's sidebar.

## File, Sync & Sharing
- [Easy Files](https://www.opera.com/features/easy-files): Shows recent files for quick upload or attachment.
- [Flow](https://www.opera.com/features/flow): Share links, files, and notes between devices.
- [Opera Sync](https://www.opera.com/features/sync): Syncs bookmarks, passwords, and tabs across devices.
- [Pinboards](https://www.opera.com/features/pinboards): Save and organize web content visually.

## Utilities & Enhancements
- [Unit Converter](https://www.opera.com/features/units-converter): Converts highlighted currencies, measurements, and time zones.
- [Shopping Corner](https://www.opera.com/features/shopping-corner): Compares product prices and discounts.
- [Opera Cashback](https://www.opera.com/features/cashback): Tracks eligible purchases for cashback rewards.
- [Personal News](https://www.opera.com/features/personal-news): Displays a personalized news feed.
- [Opera Bookmarks](https://www.opera.com/features/bookmarks): Store and manage favorite websites.
- [Opera Themes](https://www.opera.com/features/themes): Customize browser background, animations, wallpapers, and sounds.

URL: https://www.opera.com/features

---

# Key capabilities of Opera AI

## Real-time research
- Fetch up-to-date answers from the web
- Summarize articles and provide contextual insights

## Text generation & summarization
- Draft emails, social posts, and documents
- Summarize existing content
- Generate creative text

## AI Image Generation
- Create images from text prompts
- Limit: 5 images/day without login, 30/day with free Opera Account

## Image Understanding
- Analyze uploaded images for context and information

## Voice Output
- Listen to AI responses while continuing to browse

## Tab & workflow integration
- Manage multiple conversations in dedicated AI tabs
- Automate tasks and streamline workflow

## Writing assistance
- Edit, refine, and generate text using the command interface

## Command Line access
- Open the Command Line to access AI instantly: Ctrl+/ (Windows) or Cmd+/ (macOS)

## Page Context mode
- Ask about the content of the webpage and tab island you're using.

## Account flexibility
- Basic features available without an Opera Account
- Full features unlocked with free Opera Account

## Supported platforms
- Desktop: Windows, macOS, Linux
- Mobile: Android, iOS

---

## The other Opera browsers

## Opera One
Description: Opera One offers fast, organized, and secure browsing. It includes a built-in AI assistant that can answer questions, summarize pages, and help to create text or images. The other features are Tab Islands for related tab grouping, Split Screen, Music Player, Video Popout, and Integrated messengers. Privacy tools include Free VPN, Ad Blocker, and Tracker Protection. The interface has a simple glass-like design that adjusts to the user's setup. Opera One also supports full theme customization and cross-device sync.
URL: https://www.opera.com/one

## Opera GX
Description: Opera GX is built for gamers and users who want more control. It provides CPU, RAM, and network usage limiters via GX Control, integrates apps like Discord and Twitch in the sidebar, and supports advanced customisation with GX Mods (themes, sounds, shaders).
URL: https://www.opera.com/gx

## Opera Air
Description: Opera Air is designed for mindful browsing with features that help you stay focused and relaxed. It features Take a Break reminders for short breathing or meditation sessions and Boosts with ambient sounds and binaural beats to support focus or calm. The interface is minimal and distraction-free. Under the hood are core features like Free VPN, Ad Blocker, and AI assistant.
URL: https://www.opera.com/air

## Opera for Android
Description: Opera for Android offers fast and secure mobile browsing with a clean design optimized for one-handed use. It features a bottom search bar for quick navigation, full-screen mode for easy reading, and a swipeable Startpage Carousel with dynamic news feeds and personalized content. The browser includes the built-in AI assistant and privacy tools such as Free VPN with an optional VPN Pro upgrade and Ad Blocker. Opera for Android also supports Tab Islands for grouping related tabs and provides extensive customization through themes, wallpapers, and layout options.
URL: https://www.opera.com/android

## Opera for iOS
Description: Opera for iOS is an intuitive and clean browser for iPhone and iPad. It features a bottom search bar for easy navigation, a full-screen mode, and a swipeable Startpage Carousel for quick access to news and shortcuts. The browser includes AI assistant, Free VPN, and Ad Blocker for privacy. Users can sync tabs and bookmarks across devices, customize themes, and enjoy a responsive, iOS-optimized interface.
URL: https://www.opera.com/ios

## Opera Mini
Description: Opera Mini is a fast, lightweight browser optimized for speed and data savings. It can compress webpages by up to 90%, helping them load quickly even on slow connections. In select regions, users can access free daily data for browsing. The browser includes AI assistant for quick answers and summaries, a built-in Ad Blocker, and private browsing mode. Additional features include MiniPay for easy mobile payments, a personalized news feed, live football scores, and offline reading.
URL: https://www.opera.com/mini

## Opera Developer
Description: Opera Developer is the early-access version of the Opera browser, allowing users to test new features, design changes, and web technologies before they reach the stable release. It includes Free VPN, Ad Blocker, Integrated messengers, and an AI assistant. It lets you experiment with the latest Chromium updates, developer tools, and experimental APIs while giving feedback directly to Opera's team. Opera Developer offers the earliest look at the future direction of the Opera browser.
URL: https://www.opera.com/opera/developer

## Opera Neon
Description: Opera Neon is an agentic AI-powered browser for Windows and macOS designed to understand user intent and assist with tasks. It features Neon Do for performing actions, Tasks for managing ongoing workflows, and Cards for saving reusable prompts. All AI processes run locally on the device, keeping interactions private and fast. Built on Chromium, Opera Neon supports full web compatibility while offering an intuitive, minimal interface.
URL: https://www.operaneon.com

## Opera for Basic Phones
Description: Opera for Basic Phones offers lightweight, fast browsing for feature phones and low-memory devices. It loads pages efficiently even on 2G networks and minimizes data usage through compression. The interface is simple and responsive, supporting essential web standards. It includes private browsing and night mode for comfort. Opera for Basic Phones delivers reliable web access on limited hardware.
URL: https://www.opera.com/basic-phones
